fields.label: Windows Update settings

column.name: WindowsUpdateSettings
column.description: Windows Update posture as a JSON object: co-management state (CoMgmtWorkload, CoMgmtValue) plus the WindowsUpdate and WindowsUpdate\AU policy registry values. Values are strings; an empty string means not configured.

fields.label: Diagnostic data (telemetry) settings

column.name: DiagnosticDataSettings
column.description: Windows diagnostic data / telemetry policy as a JSON object: all configured values under the DataCollection policy key (e.g. AllowTelemetry_PolicyManager, AllowDeviceNameInTelemetry, LimitDiagnosticLogCollection, LimitDumpCollection). Values are strings.

fields.label: Telemetry upload status (DiagTrack)
fields.collector:
$diagTrack = 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Diagnostics\DiagTrack'
$dt = Get-ItemProperty -Path $diagTrack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$ar = Get-ItemProperty -Path "$diagTrack\HeartBeats\Aria" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$sv = Get-ItemProperty -Path "$diagTrack\SevilleEventlogManager" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$rs = Get-ItemProperty -Path "$diagTrack\RegionalSettings" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$ft = {
    param($Ticks)
    if (-not $Ticks -or [int64]$Ticks -le 0) { return $null }
    [DateTime]::FromFileTimeUtc([int64]$Ticks).ToString('o')
}
[pscustomobject]@{
    LastSuccessfulUploadTime             = & $ft $dt.LastSuccessfulUploadTime
    LastSuccessfulNormalUploadTime       = & $ft $dt.LastSuccessfulNormalUploadTime
    LastSuccessfulRealtimeUploadTime     = & $ft $dt.LastSuccessfulRealtimeUploadTime
    LastSuccessfulCostDeferredUploadTime = & $ft $dt.LastSuccessfulCostDeferredUploadTime
    LastInvalidHttpCode                  = if ($null -ne $ar.LastInvalidHttpCode) { '0x{0:X8}' -f [uint32]$ar.LastInvalidHttpCode } else { $null }
    VortexHttpAttempts                   = $ar.VortexHttpAttempts
    VortexHttpFailures4xx                = $ar.VortexHttpFailures4xx
    VortexHttpFailures5xx                = $ar.VortexHttpFailures5xx
    SuccessfulConnections                = $sv.SuccessfulConnections
    FailedConnections                    = $sv.FailedConnections
    CollectorFunctionalRegionalUrl       = $rs.CollectorFunctionalRegionalUrl
    CollectorDiagnosticRegionalUrl       = $rs.CollectorDiagnosticRegionalUrl
    WatsonRegionalServerName             = $rs.WatsonRegionalServerName
    LastSettingsUpdateTime               = & $ft $rs.LastSettingsUpdateTime
}

column.name: TelemetryUploadStatus
column.description: DiagTrack telemetry upload health as a JSON object: last successful upload times (UTC), Aria heartbeat counters (attempts, 4xx/5xx failures, last HTTP code), Seville connection counts, and cached regional collector endpoints.

column.name: DefaultAUService
column.description: Default Windows Update service (e.g. Microsoft Update, Windows Server Update Service).

column.name: AUMetered
column.description: Whether automatic update downloads over metered networks are allowed.

fields.label: Installed hotfixes (QFE)
fields.collector: Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_QuickFixEngineering -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object HotFixID, Description, Caption, InstalledOn, InstalledBy

column.name: Hotfixes
column.description: Installed Windows quick-fix engineering updates (hotfixes) as a JSON array (HotFixID, description, install date/user) from Win32_QuickFixEngineering.

column.name: HotFixInstalledOn
column.description: Install date as reported by Win32_QuickFixEngineering.InstalledOn.
